Comment: Jointly with the Committee on Oversight & Investigations and the Subcommittee on Early Childhood Education.

Items.Title: Oversight - Child Care Program Background Checks.
Items.ActionText: This Oversight was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Oversight - Child Care Program Background Checks.

Items.Title: Jointly with the Committee on Oversight & Investigations and the Subcommittee on Early Childhood Education
A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to background checks for child care providers, employees, and volunteers
Items.ActionText: This Introduction was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Background checks for child care providers, employees, and volunteers.

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to inspections and routine closures of child care centers
Items.ActionText: This Introduction was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Inspections and routine closures of child care centers.

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to providing leave for bone marrow and living organ donation and establishing a city bone marrow and living organ donor honor roll
Items.ActionText: This Introduction was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Providing leave for bone marrow and living organ donation and establishing a city bone marrow and living organ donor honor roll.

Items.Title: Resolution calling on the New York State Assembly to pass A.8824A, A.9648, and A.9060C, and for the Governor to sign S.8334A/A.8824A, S.8853/A.9648, and S.8496C/A.9060C, legislation requiring vaccines to be regulated, recommended, administered, and insured based on the recommendations of various nationally and internationally recognized healthcare organizations alongside the federal advisory committee on immunization practices
Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing Held by Committee
Items.MatterName: Requiring vaccines to be regulated based on the recommendations of various nationally and internationally recognized healthcare organizations. (A.8824A, A.9648, and A.9060C, S.8334A/A.8824A, S.8853/A.9648, and S.8496C/A.9060C)

Items.Title: Resolution calling on the New York State Assembly to pass, and the Governor to sign, S.4786/A.8345A, to enact the “New York affordable drug manufacturing act”
Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing Held by Committee

Items.Title: Resolution calling on the New York State Assembly to pass A.3839, and the Governor to sign S.5852/A.3839, requiring insurance to reimburse the total direct and indirect practice expenses associated with vaccinations
Items.ActionName: Hearing on P-C Item by Comm
Items.ActionText: This Resolution was Hearing on P-C Item by Comm
Items.MatterName: Requiring insurance to reimburse the total direct and indirect practice expenses associated with vaccinations (S.5852/A.3839).

Items.MinutesNote: Other Council Members Attending: Gutiérrez, Krishnan, Carr, Zhuang, Morano, Ung, Ariola, Lee, Williams, Riley, Joseph and Brewer
